name: Trinity Square Cafe Moroccan Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil and fry the onion and garlic until golden brown.
2. Place the tomatoes and their liquid in a bowl and crush them with a potato masher or spoon, breaking into small pieces. Add the crushed tomatoes to the onions, reduce heat to very low, add peanut butter, and stir until well combined.
3. Add cumin, hot sauce, cayenne, chili powder, vinegar, salt, pepper, sugar, tomato paste, and water. Stir until well combined.
4. Cook over low heat at a bare simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring frequently. Keep the heat low as the soup burns easily and do not allow it to come to a full boil.
